title: Spicy Bouncy-QQ Adventurous Algerian Chestnuts Tagine
description: Inspired by traditional Algerian cuisine, this spicy and adventurous tagine is a unique twist on a classic dish. Featuring shio-koji-cured chestnuts and a blend of aromatic spices, this recipe is sure to delight.

ingredients.name: Chestnuts
ingredients.notes: fresh or dried, 5-6 chestnuts per cup

ingredients.name: Shio-koji
ingredients.notes: available at most Japanese grocery stores or online

instructions: Heat the olive oil over medium-high heat in a large Dutch oven or clay tagine
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized and dark golden brown, about 20 minutes
Add the garlic and ginger and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute
Add the cumin and cayenne pepper and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute
Add the chestnuts and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are coated in the spice blend and slightly browned, about 5 minutes
Add the shio-koji and stir to combine, cooking for 2-3 minutes
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Cover the pot and bring to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chestnuts are tender
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot
Note: If using dried chestnuts, rehydrate them according to package instructions before using in the recipe
Note: If using fresh chestnuts, peel and chop them before using in the recipe
